mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pay_amount) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL ), 0) AS cumulativePaidAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL ), 0) AS cumulativePaidOrderCount, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pay_amount) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time >= CURRENT_DATE() AND pay_time < DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ), 0) AS todayPaidAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time >= CURRENT_DATE() AND pay_time < DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ), 0) AS todayPaidOrderCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' ), 0) AS pendingShipmentOrderCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND order_status = 'PENDING_RECEIPT' ), 0) AS pendingReceiptOrderCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND after_sale_status IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') ), 0) AS pendingAfterSaleCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND after_sale_status = 'PROCESSING' ), 0) AS processingAfterSaleCount

SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pay_amount) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS paidAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS paidOrderCount, COALESCE(( SELECT AVG(pay_amount) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS averageOrderAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(refund_amount) FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS refundAmount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS afterSaleApplyCount, COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cohort.quantity) FROM (SELECT moi.id AS order_item_id, moi.quantity FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON mo.id = moi.order_id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND moi.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND mo.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND mo.pay_time < #{endTime}) cohort INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT order_item_id FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND after_sale_type = 'RETURN_REFUND' AND after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED')) risk ON risk.order_item_id = cohort.order_item_id ), 0) AS returnRefundQuantity

SELECT COALESCE(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, pay_time, deliver_time)) / 3600, 1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND deliver_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS averageShipmentHours, COALESCE(( SELECT ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, deliver_time, receive_time)) / 3600, 1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND deliver_time IS NOT NULL AND receive_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} ), 0) AS averageReceiptHours, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND order_status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} AND pay_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) ), 0) AS overdueShipmentOrderCount, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND order_status = 'PENDING_RECEIPT' AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND deliver_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} AND deliver_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ), 0) AS overdueReceiptOrderCount

SELECT after_sale_status AS status, COUNT(1) AS count FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY after_sale_status ORDER BY count DESC, after_sale_status

SELECT apply_reason AS reason, COUNT(1) AS count FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} AND apply_reason IS NOT NULL AND apply_reason != '' GROUP BY apply_reason ORDER BY count DESC, apply_reason

SELECT moi.product_id AS productId, MAX(moi.product_name) AS productName, MAX(moi.image_url) AS productImage, COALESCE(SUM(moi.quantity), 0) AS soldQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(moi.total_price), 0) AS paidAmount FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON mo.id = moi.order_id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND moi.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND mo.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND mo.pay_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY moi.product_id ORDER BY soldQuantity DESC, paidAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT cohort.productId, MAX(cohort.productName) AS productName, MAX(cohort.productImage) AS productImage, COALESCE(SUM(cohort.quantity), 0) AS soldQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN risk.orderItemId IS NOT NULL THEN cohort.quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returnRefundQuantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN risk.orderItemId IS NOT NULL THEN risk.refundAmount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refundAmount FROM (SELECT moi.id AS orderItemId, moi.product_id AS productId, moi.product_name AS productName, moi.image_url AS productImage, moi.quantity AS quantity FROM mall_order_item moi INNER JOIN mall_order mo ON mo.id = moi.order_id WHERE mo.is_deleted = 0 AND moi.is_deleted = 0 AND mo.paid = 1 AND mo.pay_time IS NOT NULL AND mo.pay_time >= #{startTime} AND mo.pay_time < #{endTime}) cohort LEFT JOIN (SELECT mas.order_item_id AS orderItemId, MAX(mas.refund_amount) AS refundAmount FROM mall_after_sale mas WHERE mas.is_deleted = 0 AND mas.after_sale_type = 'RETURN_REFUND' AND mas.after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY mas.order_item_id) risk ON risk.orderItemId = cohort.orderItemId GROUP BY cohort.productId HAVING returnRefundQuantity > 0 ORDER BY returnRefundQuantity DESC, soldQuantity DESC, refundAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, #{groupFormat}) AS label, COUNT(1) AS paidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS paidAmount FROM mall_order WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND paid = 1 AND pay_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_time >= #{startTime} AND pay_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(pay_time, #{groupFormat}) ORDER BY label

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(apply_time, #{groupFormat}) AS label, COUNT(1) AS afterSaleApplyCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN after_sale_status IN ('APPROVED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED') THEN refund_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refundAmount FROM mall_after_sale WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND apply_time >= #{startTime} AND apply_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(apply_time, #{groupFormat}) ORDER BY label
